original: 3 . Abhisamayakathā
content: 3.現觀的談論

original: 19. {Abhisamayo}ti .
Kena abhisameti?
content: 他以什麼現觀？

original: Cittena abhisameti.
content: 以心現觀。

original: Hañci cittena abhisameti, tena hi aññāṇī abhisameti?
content: 哦！以心現觀？如果那樣的話，無智者現觀？

original: Na aññāṇī abhisameti.
content: 無智者不現觀，

original: Ñāṇena abhisameti.
content: 以智現觀。

original: Hañci ñāṇena abhisameti, tena hi acittena ca ñāṇena ca acittako[ tena hi acittako( syā.)] abhisameti?
content: 哦！以智現觀？如果那樣的話，無心者現觀(泰國版)？

original: Na acittako abhisameti.
content: 無心者不現觀，

original: Cittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 以心與以智現觀。

original: Hañci cittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti, tena hi kāmāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 哦！以心與以智現觀？如果那樣的話，以欲界心與以智現觀？

original: Na kāmāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以欲界心與以智現觀。

original: Tena hi rūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如果那樣的話，以色界心與以智現觀？

original: Na rūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以色界心與以智現觀。

original: Tena hi arūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如果那樣的話，以無色界心與以智現觀？

original: Na arūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以無色界心與以智現觀。

original: Tena hi kammassakatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如果那樣的話，以業屬自己的心與以智現觀？

original: Na kammassakatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以業屬自己的心與以智現觀。

original: Tena hi saccānulomikacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如果那樣的話，以隨順真實的心與以智現觀？

original: Na saccānulomikacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以隨順真實的心與以智現觀。

original: Tena hi atītacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如果那樣的話，以過去心與以智現觀？

original: Na atītacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以過去心與以智現觀。

original: Tena hi anāgatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如果那樣的話，以未來心與以智現觀？

original: Na anāgatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以未來心與以智現觀。

original: Tena hi paccuppannalokiyacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如果那樣的話，以現在世間心與以智現觀？

original: Na paccuppannalokiyacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 不以現在世間心與以智現觀，

original: Lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe paccuppannacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 在出世間道剎那以現在心與以智現觀。

original: Kathaṃ lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe paccuppannacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?
content: 如何在出世間道剎那以現在心與以智現觀？

original: Lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe uppādādhipateyyaṃ cittaṃ ñāṇassa hetu paccayo ca.
content: 在出世間道剎那生起的增上心為智的因與緣，

original: Taṃsampayuttaṃ nirodhagocaraṃ dassanādhipateyyaṃ ñāṇaṃ cittassa hetu paccayo ca.
content: 該[心]相應的滅為行境之看見增上智為心的因與緣，

original: Taṃsampayuttaṃ ñāṇaṃ nirodhagocaraṃ.
content: 該[心]相應的智有滅為行境，

original: Evaṃ lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe paccuppannacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.
content: 這樣，在出世間道剎那以現在心與以智現觀。

original: 20. Kiṃ nu ettakoyeva abhisamayoti?
content: 20.如何，現觀就只是這樣嗎？

original: Na hi.
content: 不，

original: Lokuttara maggakkhaṇe dassanābhisamayo sammādiṭṭhi, abhiniropanābhisamayo sammāsaṅkappo, pariggahābhisamayo sammāvācā, samuṭṭhānābhisamayo sammākammanto, vodānābhisamayo sammāājīvo, paggahābhisamayo sammāvāyāmo, upaṭṭhānābhisamayo sammāsati, avikkhepābhisamayo sammāsamādhi;
content: 在出世間道剎那有看見現觀的正見；導向現觀的正志；攝受現觀的正語；等起現觀的正業；清白現觀的正命；努力現觀的正精進；現起現觀的正念；不散亂現觀的正定；

original: upaṭṭhānābhisamayo satisambojjhaṅgo, pavicayābhisamayo dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgo, paggahābhisamayo vīriyasambojjhaṅgo, pharaṇābhisamayo pītisambojjhaṅgo, upasamābhisamayo passaddhisambojjhaṅgo, avikkhepābhisamayo samādhisambojjhaṅgo, paṭisaṅkhānābhisamayo upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo;
content: 現起現觀的念覺支；伺察現觀的擇法覺支；努力現觀的活力覺支；遍滿現觀的喜覺支；寂靜現觀的寧靜覺支；不散亂現觀的定覺支；省察現觀的平靜覺支；

original: assaddhiye akampiyābhisamayo saddhābalaṃ, kosajje akampiyābhisamayo vīriyabalaṃ, pamāde akampiyābhisamayo satibalaṃ, uddhacce akampiyābhisamayo samādhibalaṃ, avijjāya akampiyābhisamayo paññābalaṃ;
content: 在無信上不會被搖動現觀的信力；在懈怠上不會被搖動現觀的活力之力；在放逸上不會被搖動現觀的念力；在掉舉上不會被搖動現觀的定力；在無明上不會被搖動現觀的慧力；

original: adhimokkhābhisamayo saddhindriyaṃ, paggahābhisamayo vīriyindriyaṃ, upaṭṭhānābhisamayo satindriyaṃ, avikkhepābhisamayo samādhindriyaṃ, dassanābhisamayo paññindriyaṃ.
content: 勝解現觀的信根；努力現觀的活力根；現起現觀的念根；不散亂現觀的定根；看見現觀的慧根。

original: Ādhipateyyaṭṭhena indriyābhisamayo, akampiyaṭṭhena balābhisamayo, niyyānaṭṭhena bojjhaṅgābhisamayo, hetuṭṭhena maggābhisamayo, upaṭṭhānaṭṭhena satipaṭṭhānābhisamayo, padahaṭṭhena sammappadhānābhisamayo , ijjhanaṭṭhena iddhipādābhisamayo, tathaṭṭhena saccābhisamayo, avikkhepaṭṭhena samathābhisamayo, anupassanaṭṭhena vipassanābhisamayo, ekarasaṭṭhena samathavipassanābhisamayo, anativattanaṭṭhena yuganaddhābhisamayo, saṃvaraṭṭhena sīlavisuddhiabhisamayo, avikkhepaṭṭhena visuddhiabhisamayo, dassanaṭṭhena diṭṭhivisuddhiabhisamayo, muttaṭṭhena vimokkhābhisamayo, paṭivedhaṭṭhena vijjābhisamayo, pariccāgaṭṭhena vimuttiabhisamayo, samucchedaṭṭhena khaye ñāṇaṃ abhisamayo.
content: 以增上義的根現觀；以不會被搖動義的力現觀；以出離義的覺支現觀；以因義的道現觀；以現起義的念住現觀；以勤奮義的正勤現觀；以成功義的神足現觀；以真實義的諸諦現觀；以不散亂義的奢摩他現觀；以隨看義的毘婆舍那現觀；以一味義的奢摩他、毘婆舍那現觀；以不超越義的雙連現觀；以自制義的戒清淨現觀；以不散亂義的[心]清淨現觀；以看見義的見清淨現觀；以已脫離義的解脫現觀；以貫通義的明現觀；以遍捨義的解脫現觀；以斷絕義的滅盡智現觀；[以安息義的無生智現觀；]

original: Chando mūlaṭṭhena abhisamayo, manasikāro samuṭṭhānaṭṭhena abhisamayo, phasso samodhānaṭṭhena abhisamayo, vedanā samosaraṇaṭṭhena abhisamayo, samādhi pamukhaṭṭhena abhisamayo , sati ādhipateyyaṭṭhena abhisamayo, paññā tatuttaraṭṭhena abhisamayo, vimutti sāraṭṭhena abhisamayo, amatogadhaṃ nibbānaṃ pariyosānaṭṭhena abhisamayo.
content: 以根本義欲的現觀；以引起義作意的現觀；以集合義觸的現觀；以會合義受的現觀；以上首義定的現觀；以增上義念的現觀；以從那裡更上義慧的現觀；以核心義解脫的現觀；以完結義不死的立足處之涅槃的現觀。

original: 21. Kiṃ nu ettakoyeva abhisamayoti?
content: 21.如何，現觀就只是這樣嗎？

original: Na hi.
content: 不，

original: Sotāpattimaggakkhaṇe dassanābhisamayo sammādiṭṭhi… pe… amatogadhaṃ nibbānaṃ pariyosānaṭṭhena abhisamayo.
content: 在須陀洹道剎那有看見現觀的正見……（中略）以完結義不死的立足處之涅槃的現觀。

original: Kiṃ nu ettakoyeva abhisamayoti?
content: 如何，現觀就只是這樣嗎？

original: Na hi.
content: 不，

original: Sotāpattiphalakkhaṇe dassanābhisamayo sammādiṭṭhi… pe… paṭippassaddhaṭṭhena anuppāde ñāṇaṃ abhisamayo.
content: 在須陀洹果剎那有看見現觀的正見……（中略）以安息義的無生智現觀；

original: Chando mūlaṭṭhena abhisamayo… pe… amatogadhaṃ 5 nibbānaṃ pariyosānaṭṭhena abhisamayo.
content: 以根本義欲的現觀……（中略）以完結義不死的立足處之涅槃的現觀。

original: Kiṃ nu ettakoyeva abhisamayoti?
content: 如何，現觀就只是這樣嗎？

original: Na hi.
content: 不，

original: Sakadāgāmimaggakkhaṇe… pe… sakadāgāmiphalakkhaṇe… anāgāmimaggakkhaṇe… anāgāmiphalakkhaṇe… arahattamaggakkhaṇe… pe… arahattaphalakkhaṇe dassanābhisamayo sammādiṭṭhi, abhiniropanābhisamayo sammāsaṅkappo… pe… paṭippassaddhaṭṭhena anuppāde ñāṇaṃ abhisamayo.
content: 在一來道剎那……（中略）在一來果剎那……在不還道剎那……在不還果剎那……在阿羅漢道剎那……（中略）在阿羅漢果剎那有看見現觀的正見；導向現觀的正志……（中略）以安息義的無生智現觀；

original: Chando mūlaṭṭhena abhisamayo… pe… amatogadhaṃ nibbānaṃ pariyosānaṭṭhena abhisamayo.
content: 以根本義欲的現觀……（中略）以完結義不死的立足處之涅槃的現觀。

original: Yvāyaṃ [ syāyaṃ( syā. pī.)] kilese pajahati, atīte kilese pajahati… pe… anāgate kilese pajahati, paccuppanne kilese pajahati, atīte kilese pajahatīti.
content: 凡這位[聖者]捨斷諸污染，他捨斷過去的諸污染{……（中略）}；捨斷未來的諸污染；捨斷現在的諸污染。

original: Hañci atīte kilese pajahati, tena hi khīṇaṃ khepeti, niruddhaṃ nirodheti, vigataṃ vigameti, atthaṅgataṃ atthaṅgameti, atītaṃ yaṃ na atthi taṃ pajahatīti?
content: 「捨斷過去的諸污染」：「哦！捨斷過去的諸污染？如果那樣的話，他捨棄已滅盡的；滅掉已滅的；消失已消失的，他捨斷過去那些不存在的？」

original: Na atīte kilese pajahatīti.
content: 「他沒捨斷過去的諸污染。」

original: Anāgate kilese pajahatīti.
content: 「捨斷未來的諸污染」：

original: Hañci anāgate kilese pajahati, tena hi ajātaṃ pajahati, anibbattaṃ pajahati, anuppannaṃ pajahati, apātubhūtaṃ pajahati, anāgataṃ yaṃ na atthi taṃ pajahatīti?
content: 「哦！捨斷未來的諸污染？如果那樣的話，他捨斷未來的；捨斷未發生的；捨斷未生起的；捨斷未出現的，他捨斷未來那些不存在的？」

original: Na anāgate kilese pajahatīti.
content: 「他沒捨斷未來的諸污染。」

original: Paccuppanne kilese pajahatīti.
content: 「捨斷現在的諸污染」：

original: Hañci paccuppanne kilese pajahati, tena hi ratto rāgaṃ pajahati, duṭṭho dosaṃ pajahati, mūḷho mohaṃ pajahati, vinibaddho mānaṃ pajahati, parāmaṭṭho diṭṭhiṃ pajahati ,
content: 「哦！捨斷現在的諸污染？如果那樣的話，貪染者捨斷貪；憤怒者捨斷瞋；愚癡者捨斷癡；被繫縛者捨斷慢；執取者捨斷見；

original: Vikkhepagato uddhaccaṃ pajahati, aniṭṭhaṅgato vicikicchaṃ pajahati, thāmagato anusayaṃ pajahati, kaṇhasukkadhammā yuganaddhā samameva vattanti, saṃkilesikā[ taṃsaṃkilesikā( syā. ka.)] maggabhāvanā hoti?
content: 來到散亂者捨斷掉舉；沒走到結論者捨斷疑；來到剛毅者捨斷[[anuseti#煩惱潛在趨勢]]；黑白法俱存、平等地轉起；污染者有道的修習？」

original: Na hi atīte kilese pajahati, na anāgate kilese pajahati, na paccuppanne kilese pajahatīti.
content: 「他沒捨斷過去的諸污染；沒捨斷未來的諸污染；沒捨斷現在的諸污染。」

original: Hañci na atīte kilese pajahati, na anāgate… pe… na paccuppanne kilese pajahati, tena hi natthi maggabhāvanā, natthi phalasacchikiriyā, natthi kilesappahānaṃ, natthi dhammābhisamayoti?
content: 「哦！沒捨斷過去的諸污染；沒捨斷未來……（中略）沒捨斷現在的諸污染？如果那樣的話，沒有道的修習；沒有果的作證；沒有污染的捨斷；沒有法的現觀？」

original: Atthi maggabhāvanā, atthi phalasacchikiriyā, atthi kilesappahānaṃ, atthi dhammābhisamayo.
content: 「有道的修習；有果的作證；有污染的捨斷；有法的現觀，

original: Yathā kathaṃ viya?
content: 依如何呢？

original: Seyyathāpi taruṇo rukkho ajātaphalo.
content: 猶如未生果實的幼樹

original: Tamenaṃ puriso mūlaṃ chindeyya.
content: 被某個人切斷根，

original: Ye tassa rukkhassa ajātaphalā, te ajātāyeva na jāyanti, anibbattāyeva na nibbattanti, anuppannāyeva na uppajjanti, apātubhūtāyeva na pātubhavanti.
content: 凡那棵樹的未生果實，那些未生的就不生；未發生的就不發生；未生起的就不生起；未出現的就不出現。

original: Evamevaṃ uppādo hetu, uppādo paccayo kilesānaṃ nibbattiyāti.
content: 同樣的，『對諸污染的發生，生起是因、生起是緣。』

original: Uppāde ādīnavaṃ disvā anuppāde cittaṃ pakkhandati.
content: 看見在生起上的過患後，於不生起心躍入；

original: Anuppāde cittassa pakkhandattā ye uppādapaccayā kilesā nibbatteyyuṃ, te ajātāyeva na jāyanti, anibbattāyeva na nibbattanti, anuppannāyeva na uppajjanti, apātubhūtāyeva na pātubhavanti.
content: 於不生起心的躍入狀態，以生起為緣會發生的諸污染，那些未生的就不生；未發生的就不發生；未生起的就不生起；未出現的就不出現。

original: Evaṃ hetunirodhā dukkhanirodho.
content: 這樣，以因滅有苦滅。

original: Pavattaṃ hetu, nimittaṃ hetu, āyūhanā hetu.
content: 流轉是因……相是因……

original: Āyūhanā paccayo kilesānaṃ nibbattiyāti.
content: 『對諸污染的發生，堆積是因、堆積是緣。』

original: Āyūhane ādīnavaṃ disvā anāyūhane cittaṃ pakkhandati.
content: 看見在堆積上的過患後，於不堆積心躍入；

original: Anāyūhane cittassa pakkhandattā, ye āyūhanapaccayā kilesā nibbatteyyuṃ, te ajātāyeva na jāyanti, anibbattāyeva na nibbattanti, anuppannāyeva na uppajjanti, apātubhūtāyeva na pātubhavanti.
content: 於不堆積心的躍入狀態，以堆積為緣會發生的諸污染，那些未生的就不生；未發生的就不發生；未生起的就不生起；未出現的就不出現。

original: Evaṃ hetunirodhā dukkhanirodho.
content: 這樣，以因滅有苦滅。

original: Evaṃ atthi maggabhāvanā, atthi phalasacchikiriyā, atthi kilesappahānaṃ, atthi dhammābhisamayoti.
content: 這樣，有道的修習；有果的作證；有污染的捨斷；有法的現觀。」

original: Abhisamayakathā niṭṭhitā.
content: 現觀的談論終了。
